title: WSLP@EMNLP-2026 Shared Task - Word\Sign  Presence Prediction
description: Predict if a given word\Sign (gloss) is present in a full Indian Sign Language (ISL) sentence video, addressing sign spotting and context alignment challenges.
description_zh: 给定一个单词\符号（手语词汇），预测其是否出现在完整的印度手语（ISL）句子视频中，解决手语识别和上下文对齐的挑战。

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Welcome to the WSLP@EMNLP-2026 Shared Task: Word\Sign Presence Prediction

Advancing Indian Sign Language Understanding through Sign Spotting

Registration

To participate in this shared task, please visit the "Participate" tab and create a Codabench account using a valid institutional or personal email address. Participation is open to both individuals and teams.

After registration, navigate to your Settings and fill in all the required details.

Please ensure that your team name (or individual name) is clearly identifiable and used consistently across all submissions.

Overview

Indian Sign Language (ISL) is a rich and expressive visual language. In this shared task, participants are challenged to predict whether a specific word (gloss) is present within a given ISL sentence video — a task commonly known as sign spotting.

This task is crucial for real-world applications such as query-based sign language video retrieval and semantic search. It represents a step forward in building models that understand continuous signing in a structured and meaningful way.

We provide a dedicated dataset — the Word\Sign Presence Dataset — containing 1,543 (video, word) query pairs. Your goal is to build a model that can accurately predict whether a queried word is signed in a given ISL sentence video.

Phases

The competition consists of two distinct phases:

  • Phase 1: Training & Validation – Participants will train and validate their models using the provided datasets.
  • Phase 2: Testing – A held-out test set will be released. Participants will submit predictions to evaluate the generalization of their models.

Task Details

  • Input: ISL sentence video or corresponding pose sequence, and a query word
  • Output: Binary prediction indicating the presence of the word (1 = Present, 0 = Not Present)
  • Dataset: Word Presence Dataset
  • Evaluation Metrics: Accuracy, Macro Precision, Macro Recall, Macro F1-Score

Submission Guidelines

Each submission must be a ZIP archive named submission.zip, containing the following file:

  1. answer.csv – A comma-separated file with the following three columns:
    • Column 1: sentence_id – ID of the input ISL sentence video
    • Column 2: query_id – ID of the queried word
    • Column 3: is_present – Your model’s binary prediction (1 for Present, 0 for Not Present)
    Note: Ensure that all (sentence_id, query_id) pairs appear in the exact same order as in the reference file. Mismatches may lead to invalid scoring or disqualification. Make sure columns name in the answer.csv files are (sentence_is, query_id, is_present).

Sample submission files is made available along with the dataset to guide your formatting. Sample Submission file

To submit your predictions, visit the "Submission" tab and upload your submission.zip file. Participants may make multiple submissions per day, subject to platform-imposed limits.

Results and Leaderboard

Leaderboard results will be displayed under the "Results" tab. Final rankings will be based primarily on the F1-Score for the positive class (i.e., correct prediction of presence), with Accuracy, Precision, and Recall (all macro-averaged) serving as secondary metrics.

Top-performing teams will be recognized and invited to present their approaches at the WSLP@EMNLP-2026 event.

Acknowledgements

This shared task is part of the Workshop on Sign Language Processing (WSLP@EMNLP-2026), co-located with EMNLP 2026 at Budapest, Hungary.

We sincerely thank all participants, organizers, collaborators, and the broader research community for their continued efforts in advancing the field of sign language technology.

To stay updated and connect with other participants, join our Discord server

  • Discord : Shared Task
  • Discord : Workshop
  • Shared Task Webpage
pages.content_zh: # 欢迎来到WSLP@EMNLP-2026共享任务：词/手语存在预测 ## 通过手语识别推进印度手语理解 ## 注册 要参加此共享任务，请访问"参与"选项卡，并使用有效的机构或个人电子邮件地址创建Codabench账户。 个人和团队都可以参加。 注册后，导航到您的**设置**并填入所有必需信息。 请确保您的**团队名称**（或个人名称）清晰可辨，并在所有提交中保持一致。 ## 概述 印度手语（ISL）是一种丰富而富有表现力的视觉语言。在此共享任务中，参与者需要预测特定词汇（标记）是否出现在给定的ISL句子视频中——这个任务通常被称为**手语识别**。 此任务对于实际应用至关重要，例如基于查询的手语视频检索和语义搜索。这代表了在构建以结构化和有意义的方式理解连续手语的模型方面的进步。 我们提供了一个专用数据集——**词/手语存在数据集**——包含1,543个（视频、词汇）查询对。您的目标是构建一个模型，能够准确预测查询的词汇是否在给定的ISL句子视频中被手语表达。 ## 阶段 竞赛包括两个不同的阶段： - **阶段1：训练与验证** – 参与者将使用提供的数据集训练和验证其模型。 - **阶段2：测试** – 将发布保留的测试集。参与者将提交预测以评估其模型的泛化能力。 ## 任务详情 - **输入：** ISL句子视频或对应的姿态序列，以及一个查询词汇 - **输出：** 表示词汇存在的二元预测（1 = 存在，0 = 不存在） - **数据集：** 词汇存在数据集 - **评估指标：** 准确率、宏平均精准率、宏平均召回率、宏平均F1分数 ## 提交指南 每次提交必须是名为`submission.zip`的ZIP压缩包，包含以下文件： 1. `answer.csv` – 逗号分隔的文件，包含以下三列： - **第1列：** `sentence_id` – 输入ISL句子视频的ID - **第2列：** `query_id` – 查询词汇的ID - **第3列：** `is_present` – 您模型的二元预测（`1`表示存在，`0`表示不存在） **注意：** 确保所有`(sentence_id, query_id)`对与参考文件的顺序完全相同。不匹配可能导致无效计分或被取消资格。请确保answer.csv文件中的列名为(sentence_id, query_id, is_present)。 样本提交文件已随数据集提供，用以指导您的格式设置。样本提交文件 要提交您的预测，请访问"提交"选项卡并上传您的`submission.zip`文件。参与者每天可进行多次提交，需遵守平台限制。 ## 结果和排行榜 排行榜结果将显示在排行榜选项卡下。

pages.title: Data
pages.content:
🧠 Word Presence Prediction Task

Participants are required to develop models that can predict whether a given word is present in a sign language video. This task focuses on learning meaningful word-level representations from Indian Sign Language videos.

For training, participants may use any publicly available dataset. A large corpus of Indian Sign Language videos with corresponding annotations is available for download from: here .

The validation set can be accessed from here .

The test set will be released after the Training Phase. Once available, you can download the test data from here .

📌 Note: Please ensure your models do not use any external private data. Only publicly available resources are permitted.
pages.content_zh:
🧠 词语存在预测任务

参赛者需要开发模型，以预测给定词语是否出现在手语视频中。该任务专注于从印度手语视频中学习有意义的词级表征。

在训练中，参赛者可以使用任何公开可用的数据集。一个包含大量印度手语视频及相应注释的语料库可从以下位置下载： 这里 。

验证集可从 这里 访问。

测试集将在训练阶段后发布。发布后，您可以从 这里 下载测试数据。

📌 注意： 请确保您的模型不使用任何外部私有数据。仅允许使用公开可用的资源。

pages.title: Evaluation
pages.content:
📊 Evaluation Criteria

Submissions for the Word\Sign Presence Prediction task will be evaluated using the following metrics:

  • Accuracy
  • Macro Precision
  • Macro Recall
  • Macro F1-Score

These metrics ensure a balanced evaluation across all word classes, especially in the presence of class imbalance.

You can read more about these evaluation metrics in the following resources: Precision, Recall, and F1-Score (Scikit-learn docs)
pages.content_zh:
📊 评估标准

单词/手势存在预测任务的提交将使用以下指标进行评估：

  • 准确率（Accuracy）
  • 宏平均精准率（Macro Precision）
  • 宏平均召回率（Macro Recall）
  • 宏平均F1分数（Macro F1-Score）

这些指标确保了对所有单词类别的平衡评估，特别是在存在类别不平衡的情况下。

您可以在以下资源中了解更多关于这些评估指标的信息： 精准率、召回率和F1分数（Scikit-learn文档）
